name: Wang Qi
page_title: Wang Qi 王頎 [Han] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives
historical_notes:
Wang Qi was appointed a colonel in the Northern Army under the government of Wang Yun after the assassination of Dong Zhuo in AD 192. He was soon after killed when troops led by Li Jue and former officers of Dong Zhuo stormed Chang’an. (1)

1) Hou Han shu: 9; Sanguozhi: Wei 6.

full_text:
Wang Qi 王頎
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Qi (王頎). Served Han as Commandant of the Exemplary Cavalry. Killed by Li Jue and Guo Si’s troops. Wang Qi was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Wang Qi lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
